introSection: Maskerade is a steel enclosed spinning roller coaster at Prater in Vienna, Vienna, Austria. Built by Gerstlauer, it opened on 1 May 2015.

fullText:
Maskerade is a steel enclosed spinning roller coaster at Prater in Vienna, Vienna, Austria. Built by Gerstlauer, it opened on 1 May 2015.

In early April 2015, the ride began testing. The attraction then opened on 1 May 2015.

Maskerade is an enclosed spinning coaster with a dark ride section.
